Sev3 incident log:
Idempotency cache is evicting entries too fast — we're seeing double-ingests on Nango webhook retries. ACL filter performance degrades at 500k+ chunks per tenant — we need to partition by org. The hybrid_alpha=0.7 default is too vector-heavy for technical content; 0.5 works better in eval. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev3 incident log:
Competitor analysis: Onyx and Glean are the two closest; we differentiate on LanceDB + Rust. Webinar schedule: 3 per quarter, 45min each, demo + Q&A. Topics lined up through Q3. Brand guidelines updated: new logo, new typefaces, new color palette. Asset library in Figma. Ad spend for this quarter: $40k across Google and LinkedIn, measured by signups not clicks.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev1 incident log:
PRD for the self-service org invites feature: requirements, wireframes, metrics to track. OKR: 'RAG search is used by 60% of paying orgs weekly' — currently at 34%. Feature flag policy: use flags for any change that could break existing users; remove within 30 days. Launch plan for the new dashboard: beta for 2 weeks with 5 customers, then GA.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev2 incident log:
Cost per 1M tokens for text-embedding-3-large is $0.13; fine-tuning Qwen is $0.007 per 1M. 18x cheaper. Red-team findings: 3 prompt-injection patterns that bypass our system prompt. Mitigations in review. Fine-tuning Qwen3-Embedding-4B on our internal ticket corpus improved retrieval P@10 by 3.2 points. LoRA adapter size for the intent classifier is 40MB; inference on the edge is fine, cold start is not.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev3 incident log:
Product roadmap Q2: RAG ingestion, search API, connector marketplace, rerank controls. OKR: 'RAG search is used by 60% of paying orgs weekly' — currently at 34%. User research: 12 customer interviews about the search experience. Top ask: save and share queries. Churn analysis: 3 enterprise customers churned this quarter, all cited lack of SCIM provisioning.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev1 incident log:
Bundle size regressed 300kb because we accidentally imported all of lodash instead of lodash/debounce. i18n strings for the admin console are missing Spanish translations for 38 keys. Storybook stories for the Button component are out of date; the variant prop has 7 values now, stories have 3. Core Web Vitals: LCP is 4.2s on the pricing page because the hero image is eagerly loaded.

The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. The new RBAC role for the oncall group needs get,list,watch on pods and logs across all namespaces.

sections.text:
Sev1 incident log:
Audit log retention is set to 30 days but SOC 2 requires 12 months. Need to pipe to S3 Glacier. Grafana dashboard for the checkout funnel lost its data source binding after the Grafana 10 upgrade. PagerDuty integration is missing the severity field on alerts coming from Alertmanager. Error budget dashboard shows we've burned 40% of the monthly budget already; it's the 8th.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev3 incident log:
Critical CVE in the postgres-driver version we're pinning; upgrade path breaks the prepared-statement cache. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated. Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev3 incident log:
The reranker is returning identical scores for candidates with very different content — the model is clipping. Ingest pipeline is losing mini-chunks when a section is exactly at the boundary token count. Chunk overlap at 20% isn't enough for long-form legal docs; bump to 30% for that tenant. Embedding drift: after the model update, existing chunks no longer match new queries well.

sections.text:
Sev2 incident log:
Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start. Ingress controller is returning 502s intermittently; config reload timing is racing with upstream rotation. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node. HPA keeps scaling up then immediately back down — the target CPU is oscillating around the threshold.
sections.title: Incident

sections.text:
Sev1 incident log:
Foreign key cascade on org_memberships is deleting audit entries — the constraint should be RESTRICT. The daily snapshot job failed because the backup role lost the SELECT grant on the new partitions. Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative. Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod.
